text: Hey, I'm Mihir Kumar. I'm a web developer who just really enjoys building things. I work mostly with Python and Flask, and I’ve spent a lot of time working on different projects,sometimes on my own, and sometimes teaming up with friends. A few are still quick MVPs, others are fully built, but all of them have taught me something new. For me, it’s not just about writing code. I love the whole process of taking an idea and figuring out how to make it real and I’m always looking for a fresh problem to solve.
